summary: The diff implements REQ-79 and REQ-80 in UsersControlsPanel.tsx with proper useGetAllUsers hook usage, loading skeleton, empty-state message, search bar, and block/unblock with cache invalidation. REQ-81 (backend main.mo fix) is not evidenced in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify and fix the backend getAllUsers() query function in backend/main.mo to correctly iterate over the stable users variable and return all stored user records with the correct shape (uniqueCode, deviceId, name, server, isBlocked), without trapping or rejecting.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo are present in the diff. The diff only modifies frontend files. There is no evidence that the backend function was verified or fixed.
